tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT id, title, level, count, project, status FROM sentry_issues WHERE status = 'unresolved' ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1"}

text: I found the top unresolved Sentry issue. Now I'll send the email with that issue's details.
